title: Funky Crunchy Russian Chinese Broccoli Pasta
description: A fusion dish featuring Chinese broccoli, crispy bacon, and a nut-free pasta water emulsion, sure to please the crowd.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil for the pasta.
Cook 8 oz pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
While the pasta is cooking, heat a skillet over medium heat and cook 6 slices of bacon until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the Chinese broccoli to the skillet and cook until tender.
In a blender or food processor, combine 1 cup of the pasta water with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and blend until smooth.
Add the pasta water emulsion to the skillet with the Chinese broccoli and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the Chinese broccoli and pasta water emulsion.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with crispy bacon and serve immediately.
